== Notes for [[Item:Q107332|Q107332]] ==

* '''Abbasid Governor of Basrah (Iraq), 750-756 AD'''

Source 1: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sulayman_ibn_Ali

Source 2: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Abdallah_ibn_Ali

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000008649097772

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
